# OliveKit

> Claude Code-native design system. One house look across every project our team ships, applied by the agent and enforced so nothing drifts off-system or reads as generic AI.

Pull components with: `npx shadcn@latest add @olivekit/<name>` (registry served from GitHub raw, no server).
Bootstrap a project with: `npx github:TeamOliveCode/design-kit init`.

## Rules (read first)
- House rules (auto-loaded each session): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/CLAUDE.md
- Design skill (how to apply): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/skills/olivekit-design/SKILL.md

## Standards
- Composition — when to use which type role, measure, spacing, layout, hierarchy: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/docs/standards/composition.md
- Content & voice — action vocabulary, state copy, i18n: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/docs/standards/content.md
- Anti-AI patterns — the enforced "no AI smell" list: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/docs/standards/anti-ai-patterns.md
- App / product UI surface: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/docs/standards/app-ui.md
- Landing / marketing surface: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/docs/standards/landing.md
- Component depth bar: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/docs/standards/components.md

## Expressions (pick one per project; same components, different soul)
- instrument — utility / SaaS, dark-first, electric olive: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/packages/tokens/dist/expressions/instrument.css
- warm — consumer / expressive, light-first, coral: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/packages/tokens/dist/expressions/warm.css
- editorial — content / magazine, serif display, claret: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/TeamOliveCode/design-kit/main/packages/tokens/dist/expressions/editorial.css

## Tokens
- Semantic CSS variables + Tailwind v4 @theme (default expression): `npx shadcn add @olivekit/tokens`
- Type roles: text-display-2xl…sm, text-h1…h6, text-body-lg/body/body-sm, text-label, text-caption, text-2xs, text-code, text-overline
- Motion: ease-out (enter) / ease-in (exit) / ease-in-out / ease-brand; duration-fast/base/slow/slower

## Components (25)
- accordion: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/accordion`
- alert: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/alert`
- alert-dialog: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/alert-dialog`
- avatar: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/avatar`
- badge: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/badge`
- button: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/button`
- card: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/card`
- checkbox: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/checkbox`
- dialog: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/dialog`
- dropdown-menu: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/dropdown-menu`
- input: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/input`
- label: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/label`
- layout: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/layout`
- popover: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/popover`
- progress: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/progress`
- radio-group: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/radio-group`
- select: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/select`
- separator: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/separator`
- skeleton: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/skeleton`
- slider: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/slider`
- spinner: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/spinner`
- switch: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/switch`
- tabs: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/tabs`
- textarea: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/textarea`
- tooltip: `npx shadcn add @olivekit/tooltip`

## Enforce
- `npm run lint:design` — deterministic guardrail (fails on ad-hoc color, banned font, em-dash, middle-dot, arbitrary text size, transition-all). Wire into CI.
